title: How to convert HEIC to PNG (free, no upload, in your browser)

segments.voice: Got an iPhone photo that nothing on your computer can open?

scene.headline: HEIC won't open?
scene.sub: the format iPhones save photos in

segments.voice: Convert it to PNG. Lossless, opens everywhere, keeps transparency.

scene.headline:
PNG: lossless
+ opens everywhere
scene.sub: no quality drop, no compatibility headache

segments.voice: Bonus: PNG strips the GPS location and camera serial number embedded in your HEIC.

scene.headline:
GPS metadata
stripped automatically
scene.sub: your location stays private when you share

segments.voice: Free. No signup. Nothing to install.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash heic to png.
Drop the HEIC. Click convert. Download your PNG. Done.
Link's in the bio, give it a try!
